title: Dica

'''Dica''' was a toxic [[Planet/Legends|planet]] where [[Grievous/Legends|Qymaen jai Sheelal]], better known as [[General/Legends|General]] Grievous, was believed to have murdered a [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] who carried [[Bane's Heart (crystal)|Bane's Heart]].<ref name="Grievous">{{Hyperspace|url=hyperspace/member/insideronline/86/indexp2.html|text=The Story of General Grievous: Lord of War|int=The Story of General Grievous: Lord of War}}</ref>

{{Noncanonstart|legends=1}}
The cloudy, barren world was almost entirely lifeless due to its high acid levels. At one time it had been home to a variety of [[Exogorth/Legends|Space slug]] which ultimately became extinct as a result of the rise in acidity. The surface was pockmarked with acid lakes and pools. Grievous battled the Dark Jedi [[Kaa (Dark Jedi)|Kaa]] and [[Lii]] on the surface of the planet.<ref name="DJ" />
{{Noncanonend}}

==Appearances==
[[File:DicaSurface.jpg|thumb|left|150px|The surface of Dica was covered in acid pools and the petrified remains of giant space slugs.]]
